name: Cocoon API Proxy
description: OpenAI-compatible API proxy for decentralized AI models on the Cocoon network (TON blockchain). Provides chat completions, model listing, API key management, and TON-based billing. Use when you need to query AI models like Qwen/Qwen3-32B via a standard OpenAI-format API with cryptocurrency payments.

authentication.description: API key authentication. Create a key via POST /v1/keys. Pass as 'Authorization: Bearer ck_...' header. Keys are prefixed with 'ck_'.

skills.name: Chat Completion
skills.description: Send messages to a Cocoon AI model and receive generated text responses. Supports streaming (SSE) and non-streaming modes. Use when you need AI-generated text from models like Qwen/Qwen3-32B.

skills.name: List Models
skills.description: Retrieve the list of AI models available on the Cocoon network. Use to discover valid model IDs before making chat completion requests.

skills.name: Create API Key
skills.description: Generate a new API key and unique deposit code for a new user account. The key is shown once at creation. Use when setting up a new client for the proxy.

skills.name: Check Balance
skills.description: Return current TON balance for the authenticated API key. Use before making requests to verify sufficient funds are available.

skills.name: Get Deposit Info
skills.description: Return TON wallet address and unique memo code for depositing funds. Use when you need to add TON to fund an API key account.

pricing.description: Per-token billing with configurable markup. Prompt tokens: ~30 nanoton/token, completion tokens: ~240 nanoton/token. Minimum balance: 0.01 TON.
